title: Smith Roberts Baldischwiler, LLC | OKC Engineering Firm ransomware incident

victim.name: Smith Roberts Baldischwiler, LLC | OKC Engineering Firm

extortion.description: Many projects of large companies are now available to public. Customer information, confidential data, and much more. Successful engineering projects begin with careful collaboration between all stakeholders involved in the projects. SRB's greatest strength lies in its commitment to open communication at all stages of the project between citizens, government, utilities, and other design professionals.
